characters.name: Akihiko Motoki
characters.description: Akihiko MotokiKanjiもとき あきひこRōmajiMotoki AkihikoDrivesPorsche 911 Turbo 3.6 (964)Occupation(s)Mechanic of Tomisaka AutoMedia appearancesManga debutGinkai no Speed Star Vol. 1 Series 1 "Tomisaka Auto" Akihiko Motoki (元木明彦,Motoki Akihiko) is a main character inShutokou SPL, alongside being the main protagonist ofGinkai no Speed Star. He drive aSilver Porsche 911 Turbo 3.6 (964)and he works as mechanic for Tomisaka Auto. A young mechanic who specializes in servicingPorscheswith air-cooled engines. He is a freelance auto mechanic who took over the garage of his senior at work, Yoshimura, in Hachioji, Tokyo. He graduated from a vocational school for automobile maintenance, and according to Shingo Goto, during his vocational school days, he attacked mountain passes with anFC3S RX-7that he bought for 150,000 yen, and was called "Takao's Schumacher" because of its speed. After graduating from vocational school, he was invited by his classmate Yasuda to join Tomisaka Auto, a company specializing in imported cars. He worked there as an ordinary man, but he decided to go independent after receiving a request from Ishigami, who he became involved with in the aftermath of Yoshimura's fatal accident. He runs a garage by himself, mainly doing work received from the Shimada Group. When he takes on the maintenance of the remaining 12 911s purchased by the buyer group, he proposes that he will do the maintenance by himself, but will pay less in return for a 911 Turbo as the difference in price.

characters.name: Akio Asakura
characters.actor_name: Shun Oguri (anime)Gitan Ohtsuru (1991-1994 movies)Kota Namikawa (1998 movie)Hiroyuki Takami (2001 movie)Yuchi Nakamura (2009 movie)
characters.description: Akio AsakuraKanji朝倉アキオRōmajiAsakura AkioAge18 (before Yokohane Route 3)[1]19 (rest of the series)[2]DrivesNissan Fairlady Z 300ZX (Z31)(manga/anime) (previously)Nissan Fairlady Z (Z32)(WM: The Movie) (previously)Devil ZOccupation(s)StudentBartender (Part-Time)Gas station employee (Part-Time)Mechanic (sometimes)Portrayed byShun Oguri (anime)Gitan Ohtsuru (1991-1994 movies)Kota Namikawa (1998 movie)Hiroyuki Takami (2001 movie)Yuchi Nakamura (2009 movie)Media appearancesManga debutVol. 1 Series 1 'S30Z 1'Anime debutAct 1 'Devil Z'Arcade debutWangan MidnightGame debutWangan MidnightMovie debutWangan Midnight (1991) Akio Asakura(朝倉アキオAsakura Akio) is the main protagonist of Wangan Midnight. He is a high school student who finds a broken down Nissan Fairlady Z (S30), nicknamed the “Devil Z”, at a junkyard and with the help ofhis friend, repairs the car and starts driving it on the expressway. Akio is a gentle and humble young man, but very serious about racing. Racing is such a priority to him that he once skipped school enough to make him have to repeat a grade just to race, despite having good grades. He also worked as a waiter to get money just to repair his Z.
characters.personality_section: Akio is a gentle and humble young man, but very serious about racing. He also worked as a waiter to get money just to repair his Z.

characters.name: Eiji Kamiya
characters.description: Eiji KamiyaKanjiかみや えいじRōmajiKamiya EijiAge25DrivesMitsubishi Lancer Evolution V GSR (CP9A)Occupation(s)Owner ofWorks-RPortrayed byMitsuru Miyamoto (anime)Media appearancesManga debutVol. 16 Series 49 "Loop (Hanshin Expressway) 1"Anime debutEp. 19 "Stand By Me"Arcade debutWangan Midnight Eiji Kamiya(神谷 エイジ,Kamiya Eiji) is a supporting character inWangan Midnight. characters.name: Eri Shiina
characters.description: Eri ShiinaKanji椎名 エリRōmajiShiina EriDrivesHonda S2000 (AP2)Occupation(s)Part-timer of GT CarsMedia appearancesManga debutC1 Runner Vol. 1 Series 3 "Member 1" Eri Shiina(椎名 エリShiina Eri) is one of the three main protagonists of theWangan Midnight: C1 Runnerseries. The youngest daughter ofKohei Shiinawho's always given an cash card with unlimited limit. She's used to driving around Shuto Expressway with and S2000. She's later encountered byNobuandOgishimaand later started working as a part-timer for GT Cars.

characters.name: Gen Sasaki
characters.description: Gen SasakiKanji佐々木 元ガッちゃんRōmajiSasaki GenGacchanDrivesToyota Celsior 4.0 V8 (UCF10)Occupation(s)Speed Shop MACHOwnerPortrayed byKenji Takahashi (anime)Media appearancesManga debutVol.5 Series 16 "1986 YATABE 4"Anime debutEp. 12 'Professional'Arcade debutWangan MidnightGame debutWangan Midnight  A much-maligned character in the manga,Gen Sasaki(佐々木 元Sasaki Gen), fondly known asGatchan(ガッちゃんGacchan), is regarded as a joke in the manga, anime, and arcade game. His own vehicle, the ToyotaCelsior, which he calls the "Super Celsior" has everything from underbody lighting, to fancy emblems, to dark window tinting; but keeps the air conditioner, radio, and the back seat; all of which are normally removed during the lightening process. Although he is a pretty good driver, he gets clobbered every time he goes up against something built to race. He is also quite obnoxious, frequently bragging about the incredible upgrades he's made to psych people out. He embarrassedReinawhen he first met her one night while accompanyingYamamoto, mistaking her for a call girl.

Can be briefly seen test-driving his shop's FC RX-7 at Gotemba, before finally giving it to Kijima at the latter's request.

characters.name: Hiroshi Arai
characters.description: Hiroshi AraiKanjiあらい ひろしRōmajiArai HiroshiOccupation(s)Car-CriticMedia appearancesManga debutC1 Runner Vol.1 Series 1 ‘C1 Runner 1’ Hiroshi Arai(荒井 広志Arai Hiroshi), once known as "Ryo," is a Character inWangan Midnight: C1 Runner. Born in Ehime Prefecture. A car critic with multiple pen names, his writing is unconditionally accepted byOgishimaandShiina. In the past,Otasaid he was "a man who would do anything to make money with cars", such as importing shady oil and brokering used cars. In order to buy "GT Cars" and republish it, he contacted Ogishima and Ota, and worked energetically to get Shiina as a sponsor. When Ota asked him about his true intentions in republishing "GT Cars", he replied that he loves tuning cars.

characters.name: Hiroshi Arai

Born in Ehime Prefecture. A car critic with multiple pen names, his writing is unconditionally accepted byOgishimaandShiina. In order to buy "GT Cars" and republish it, he contacted Ogishima and Ota, and worked energetically to get Shiina as a sponsor. characters.name: Jun Kitami
characters.description: Jun KitamiKanji北見淳RōmajiKitami JunAge40DrivesNissan Fairlady Z (S30)Toyota Hiace(Maximum Tune 4 onwards)Occupation(s)Bicycle Mechanic and Owner of Kitami CycleMechanic/Car TunerPortrayed byKenta Miyake (anime)Media appearancesManga debutVolume 2 Series 5 "Tuner from Hell 1"Anime debutEp. 5 "Tuner From Hell"Arcade debutWangan MidnightGame debutWangan Midnight Jun Kitamialso known as the "Tuner from Hell" (Japanese: 地獄のチューナーRomaji: Jigoku no Chūnā), is a tuner in Wangan Midnight. Jun Kitami, He is the one that originally tuned the Devil Z and later BlackBird as well. He laughs in the face of danger and will gladly take anything past the "safe" 600BHP mark. Unfortunately, the cars he tunes are so powerful that they are extremely difficult to control (if the car does not result totally undriveable), someone even died when driving the car tuned by him. Hence his reputation as the "Devil's Tuner." He has a big scar on his face, presumably from a past racing accident. When he was young, he loved car racing, but unfortunately he had some accidents. Even though he drove powerful cars, he is now only a mechanic and a bicycle shop owner.

characters.name: Keiichiro Aizawa
characters.description: Keiichiro AizawaKanji圭一郎相沢RōmajiKeiichirou AizawaAge19DrivesToyota Supra RZ (JZA80)Occupation(s)University StudentHosting (Ladys Club RACCHUS, later Retired)Waiter (Side-job)Portrayed byKenichi Suzumura (anime)Media appearancesManga debutVolume 9 Series 25 "Legendary Max-Speed Racer 3"Anime debutEpisode 11 "llusive Top Speed Runner"Arcade debutWangan MidnightGame debutWangan Midnight (PS2) Keiichiro Aizawa(Also called as "Kei") is a supporting character inWangan Midnight. He's the main rival and character during the "Monster Machine" arc. Kei is know for driving a SilverToyota Supra RZ,dubbed as the "Monster Machine" (モンスターマシンMonsutā Mashin) tuned byKou Tominaga,Kazuo Ota,Kazuhiko YamamotoandAkio Asakura. After meetingBlackbird, Kei decided to chase after him.

characters.description: Keisuke KudoKanjiくどう けいすけRōmajiKudo KeisukeDrivesNissan Skyline GT-R V-Spec II (BNR34)Nissan Skyline GT-R (BNR32)Occupation(s)Mechanic of CRS Speed FactoryMedia appearancesManga debutShutokou SPL Vol. 1 Series 1 "Porsche Turbo 1" Keisuke Kudo (工藤 圭介, Kudo Keisuke) is the main protagonist ofShutokou SPL. characters.name: Keisuke Shibukawa
characters.description: Keisuke ShibukawaKanjiしぶかわ　けいすけRōmajiShibukawa KeisukeOccupation(s)Private TunerMedia appearancesManga debutC1 Runner Vol.4 Series 12 ‘Ryo 3’ Keisuke Shibukawa(渋川 圭介Shibukawa Keisuke) is a character inWangan Midnight: C1 Runner. A mysterious private tuner who has supported about five of his favorite racers for free over the past 20 years. He used to work at Mazda.Rikakocame across the name after looking into the maintenance history ofSato's 32R, and by the time she went to greet him to take over the maintenance, she had almost lost her passion for cars. However, she was concerned by Nobu's stylish but risky driving, so she offered to support the FD for free.

characters.name: Kenichi Yoshioka
characters.description: Kenichi YoshiokaKanji吉岡 建一RōmajiYoshioka KenichiOccupation(s)Owner of Yoshioka ENGMedia appearancesManga debutVol. 9 Series 28 'Keepsake 2'Anime debutEp. 12 'Professional'Arcade debutWangan Midnight Maximum Tune 2 Kenichi Yoshioka(吉岡 建一, Yoshioka Kenichi) is a character in the manga and anime of Wangan Midnight's "Monster Machine arc." He is the representative of "Yoshioka ENG (Engineering)" and has a unique skill and eye for exhaust parts. When Gacchan said, "Your mufflers have always exceeded the noise regulations," he retorted, "But you used to sell a lot of dangerous parts, too."

characters.name: Kohei Shiina
characters.description: Kohei ShiinaKanjiしいな こうへいRōmajiShiina KouheiOccupation(s)Manager of a medical corporationMedia appearancesManga debutC1 Runner Vol. 1 Series 3 "Member 3" Kohei Shiina(椎名 耕平Shiina Kouhei), is a supporting character inWangan Midnight: C1 Runner. He is the father ofEri Shiina. He is the manager of a medical corporation that has several hospitals under its umbrella, and Eri's father. He is a major sponsor of the new "GT Cars."

characters.name: Koichi Aizawa
characters.description: Koichi AizawaKanji相沢洸一RōmajiAizawa KouichiDrivesToyota Celica Supra XX (MA61)Portrayed byTokuyoshi Kawashima (anime)Media appearancesManga debutVolume 9 Series 25 "Legendary Max-Speed Racer 4"Anime debutEp. 11 "Illusive Top Speed Runner"Arcade debutWangan Midnight Maximum Tune 4 (flashback only)Game debutWangan Midnight (PS3) Koichi Aizawa (相沢　洸一, Aizawa Kouichi) is father ofKeiichiro Aizawain manga and anime of Wangan Midnight and he driveToyota Celica Supra XX. Koichi died by car accident 15 years prior to the start of the Monster Machine arc in Wangan Midnight, and he appears via flashback only. He briefly appeared in a flashback in Chapter 30 of Wangan Midnight Maximum Tune 4.

characters.name: Koichi Hiramoto
characters.description: Koichi HiramotoKanjiひらもと こういちRōmajiHiramoto KouichiAge28DrivesNissan Skyline GT-R (BNR32)Occupation(s)MechanicPortrayed byDaisuke Namikawa (anime)Media appearancesManga debutVolume 3 Series 9 "Mechanic 1"Anime debutEp. 7 "The Charmed Ones"Arcade debutWangan MidnightGame debutWangan Midnight Koichi Hiramoto (平本 洸一,Hiramoto Koichi)[2]is major supporting character inWangan Midnight. He's the main "Arc-Rival" during the "Perfect GT-R" arc. A hardworking man in the Green Auto Garage for 12 years. He quitted high school since he was 16 and, was a mechanic for 12 years in Green Auto Garage. He often races on the Wangan with his friendHaradauntil one day, the two encounteredReina'sGT-Rwhich makes Hiramoto decide to get his own. Despite his promise to his pregnant wifeMegumithat he had put his racing days behind him, he decides to race for the last time. Because of this, she left him to go live with her parents because it is better than wondering every night if he'll even come home. After Hiramoto made a difficult decision, he bought a "real dragon"GT-Rfor 3.15 million from his account book that had 4.2 million yen[3].

characters.name: Kou Tominaga
characters.description: Kou TominagaKanjiとみなが こうRōmajiTominaga KoOccupation(s)ECU SpecialistTominaga Speed ownerPortrayed bySusumu Chiba (anime)Media appearancesManga debutVol. 9 Series 28 "Keepsake 2"Anime debutEp. 12 "Professional"Arcade debutWangan Midnight Maximum Tune 2Game debutWangan Midnight (PS2) Kou "The Jet" Tominaga (富永 公,Tominaga Ko) is a tuner from Wangan Midnight. Tominaga’s specialty was modifying the ECU/CPU of the vehicle. His nickname is "The Jet," a term to describe his tuning method. He owned a shop namedTominaga Speed. In the anime adaptation, he is voiced by Susumu Chiba.
